    Wm4Vector4.inl

add_library(WildMagic4 STATIC ${WildMagic4_SRCS})
target_include_directories(WildMagic4 PUBLIC ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR})
set_target_properties(WildMagic4 PROPERTIES POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)
